t.t-if: len(o.line_ids.filtered(lambda line: line.tax_line_id)) in [0, 1] and o.amount_untaxed == amount_by_group[2]

div.p: Please use the following communication for your payment :

p.strong: Scan me with your banking app.

t.t-if: len(o.line_ids.filtered(lambda line: line.tax_line_id)) in [0, 1] and o.amount_untaxed == amount_by_group[2]

div.p: Please use the following communication for your payment :

p.strong: Scan me with your banking app.

div.p: Please use the following communication for your payment :

div.p: Please use the following communication for your payment :

p.strong: Scan me with your banking app.

span.class: round_shape d-block text-center ks_payment_history_text_color ks_payment_history_bckgrnd_color ks_payment_history_text_size

div.p: Please use the following communication for your payment :

p.strong: Scan me with your banking app.

span.class: round_shape d-block text-center ks_payment_history_text_color ks_payment_history_bckgrnd_color ks_payment_history_text_size

p.strong: Scan me with your banking app.

t.t-if: len(o.line_ids.filtered(lambda line: line.tax_line_id)) in [0, 1] and o.amount_untaxed == amount_by_group[2]
len(o.line_ids.filtered(lambda line: line.tax_line_id)) in [0, 1] and o.amount_untaxed == amount_by_group[2]

span.class: round_shape d-block text-center ks_payment_history_text_color ks_payment_history_bckgrnd_color ks_payment_history_text_size

div.p: Please use the following communication for your payment :

p.strong: Scan me with your banking app.

t.t-if: len(o.line_ids.filtered(lambda line: line.tax_line_id)) in [0, 1] and o.amount_untaxed == amount_by_group[2]

div.p: Please use the following communication for your payment :

p.strong: Scan me with your banking app.

thead.t-attf-class: #{'border-top border-bottom' if ks_style == 'ks_style_10' else ''} #{'custom-table-header' if ks_style == 'ks_style_4' else ''}

th.t-attf-class: #{'ks_table_design_4' if ks_style in ['ks_style_4','ks_style_7'] else ''} ks_table_head_backgrnd_color ks_table_head_text_color ks_table_head_text_size
th.name: th_quantity
th_priceunit
th.t-attf-class: #{ 'd-none d-md-table-cell' if report_type == 'html' else ''} ks_table_head_backgrnd_color ks_table_head_text_color ks_table_head_text_size

th.name: th_price_unit
th.t-attf-class: #{ 'd-none d-md-table-cell' if report_type == 'html' else ''} ks_table_head_backgrnd_color ks_table_head_text_color ks_table_head_text_size

th.name: th_taxes
th.t-attf-class: #{ 'd-none d-md-table-cell ' if report_type == 'html' else ''} ks_table_head_backgrnd_color ks_table_head_text_color ks_table_head_text_size

tr.t-attf-class: #{'ks_table_even_color' if count % 2 == 0 else 'ks_table_odd_color'} {'bg-200 o_line_section' if line.display_type == 'line_section' else 'font-italic o_line_note' if line.display_type == 'line_note' else ''}

td.t-attf-class: #{ 'd-none d-md-table-cell ' if report_type == 'html' else ''} #{'ks_table_even_color' if count%2 == 0 else 'ks_table_odd_color'}
#{ 'd-none d-md-table-cell ' if report_type == 'html' else ''} #{'ks_table_even_color' if count%2 == 0 else 'ks_table_odd_color'}
#{ 'd-none d-md-table-cell ' if report_type == 'html' else ''} #{'ks_table_even_color' if count%2 == 0 else 'ks_table_odd_color'}

th.t-attf-class: #{ks_table_head_odd_color_class or ''} #{'ks_table_design_4' if ks_table_head_even_color_class else ''} ks_table_head_backgrnd_color ks_table_head_text_color ks_table_head_text_size
#{ks_table_head_even_color_class or ks_table_head_odd_color_class or ''} ks_table_head_backgrnd_color ks_table_head_text_color ks_table_head_text_size
